case_title: DAVID J. SMITH VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-07-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAVID J. SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMAPNY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, DAVID J. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDERJ-UNCLAIMED-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DAVID SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ROBERT CROSBY, REGINAOL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAVID J. SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMAPNY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, DAVID J. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED AUG-18-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, DAVID J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION WHICH PROVIDED, IN PART, THAT IF PLAINTIFF DEFAULTED ON ANY TERM OF THE STIPULATION, PLAINTIFF WAIVED NOTICE OF PROPERTY ABANDONMENT AND THAT PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY LEFT AT THE PREMISES WAS SUBJECT TO IMMEDIATE DISPOSAL. PLAINTIFF DEFAULTED ON PAYMENT OF RENT. PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY WAS DISPOSED OF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
